creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
output from make using bundled PROTOBUF

https://tahoestores.org/makefile.err

output from make using system PROTOBUF

https://tahoestores.org/makefile.err1

list of all builds

https://tahoestores.org/pkg.list

As you can see using the bundled PROTOBUF results in 

Undefined symbol "_ZN6google8protobuf7Message17CopyWithSizeCheckEPS1_RKS1_"

while using the system PROTOBUF does not.
